name: ClawXAlwaysOn
description: Persistent background tasks via isolated sub-agent sessions with per-task budget constraints.

defaultProvider.description: Optional default provider for always-on task execution.

defaultModel.description: Optional default model for always-on task execution.

dreamProvider.description: Optional provider override for dream planning.

dreamModel.description: Optional model override for dream planning.

dataDir.description: Override the default data directory for task storage.

defaultMaxLoops.label: Default Max Loops
defaultMaxLoops.help: Maximum number of LLM interaction loops per task run (default: 50)

defaultMaxCostUsd.label: Default Max Cost (USD)
defaultMaxCostUsd.help: Maximum estimated USD cost per task run (default: 1.0)

defaultBudgetExceededAction.label: Budget Exceeded Action
defaultBudgetExceededAction.help: What to do when an always-on task exceeds budget: warn only or forcibly suspend the current task run (default: warn)

defaultProvider.label: Default Provider
defaultProvider.help: Optional provider override for always-on task execution.

defaultModel.label: Default Model
defaultModel.help: Optional model override for always-on task execution.

maxConcurrentTasks.label: Max Concurrent Tasks
maxConcurrentTasks.help: Maximum number of always-on tasks the worker will launch at the same time (default: 3)

dreamEnabled.label: Enable Dream
dreamEnabled.help: Allow the plugin to derive new pending always-on tasks from transcript, memory, and task state.

dreamIntervalMinutes.label: Dream Interval (minutes)
dreamIntervalMinutes.help: How often the dream scheduler should try to derive new pending tasks (default: 60)

dreamProvider.label: Dream Provider
dreamProvider.help: Optional provider override for dream planning.

dreamModel.label: Dream Model
dreamModel.help: Optional model override for dream planning.

dreamMaxCandidates.label: Dream Max Candidates
dreamMaxCandidates.help: Maximum number of pending tasks to derive in each dream run (default: 3)

dreamContextMessageLimit.label: Dream Transcript Messages
dreamContextMessageLimit.help: How many recent transcript messages to include when deriving dream candidates (default: 40)

logLevel.label: Log Level
logLevel.help: Minimum log level for task execution logs (default: info)

logRetentionDays.label: Log Retention (days)
logRetentionDays.help: Number of days to retain task logs before automatic cleanup (default: 30)
